0.145: (qwas balay iwal bnkis ta raral balay ga .)
3.58: (wal su qwasan qani ,,nyux su spung inu sa ga?)aw,
7.12: aw ay(nanu' sa ga),nkis bnkis balay(Yagu' Tanga' qani ga..)
11.7: (mwani hiya ga cyux mqaws bih..)
14.88: Tay-To ga  ,Tay-To ga  ray-gak
17.94: (nanu cyux mqaws ray-gak kya)o...(e...)
21.84: (ninen sey la .)ninen sey la ?
25.96: (qeri kmayal cikay ke tayal ,aki nya baqun mung cikay )`~Agu' (a..)lokhah ki
35.2: raral ga laqi tayal ga ne, ini qbaq mqwas
38.6: raral..
40.04: wahan  ta tmwang son mha i...tringa Gipun ruw. Cyu-koku lga
45.76: wahan ta nya i tkzi' mita i..ita tayal, maki ta rgyax ita Tayal
52.68: yaba su ru yutas yaki ga maki  Piyasan na rgyax ay,
58.08: nwani lga ,cyuxmaki heci', raral ga maki rgyax.
66.16: iyat simu nanaq ,mqyanux  sami Mnibu' uzi. ini su baqi uzi..
71.36: ana son mha Piyanan ini mamu son baqi uzi.
74.475: mwah Gipun ga sqyan nya ga yasa qu thuyay ta
77.795: yasa qa thuyay ta mkita, ita tayal ay
80.96: ini ta qbaq pkita' sn mha Tay-to uzi, ini ta mqbaq pkita son mha i
92.08: Pin-Ton ru Ta-kaw, Nan-Tow, raralhiya ga msparis rwa.
100.6: Tayal Tayal  mkkut uzi ru
105.04: talagay yaqih gagaTayal hiya, ulung su..
110.76: lungun yaba utux wagiq ru talagay babaw hiyal qani ma ruw
114.88: puwahun nyason mha qutux kirisito no ay
118.6: nanu yasa qa Gipun mwah sqa s'aring son mha Tay-wan qani
123.48: Tay-wan qani ga,
126.52: Tayal nanaq pi,
129.08: ru Tay-To qani hiya kahul philine ,Amecu ru Tay-To qa.(m..)
135.14: nha ga ,Amecu qani ga kahul Philine
138.395: tneqa qalang nha uzi, ke ga tnaq uzi..
141.985: ngasal nha mtnaq uzi, ana mwani ga ne..
145.085: kya su baqun ,kya su nwahan kya rwa?
